Scope and content
Student record cards and student lists from the Dairy Industry Department at Cornell.
Preferred Citation
Cornell University. Dairy Industry Department. Winter Course Student Record Cards, #21-19-1190. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Archival Materials
See also New York State College of Agriculture Winter Short Course Scrapbooks, #21-34-4029..
Related Archival Materials
See also the Michael L. and Catherine H. Whalen Collection of Cornelliana, #37-5-3784..
Related Archival Materials
See also the New York State College of Agriculture Winter Short Course Photographs, #21-34-2459.

Scope and Contents
Cards started to be used consistenly with 1909-1910 course. The nationality of the student is noted in the general notes field when known. All cards contain a photograph of the student, exceptions are noted in the processing note.
